sections.paragraph:
Original: חרדי

Transliteration: chărôdı̂y

Phonetic: khar-o-dee'

BDB Definition:

Harodite = see Harod " trembling"
  1. a resident or descendant of Harod otherwise unknown; two of David's 37 guards, Shammah and Elika, called Harodites

Origin: from a derivative of H2729 [compare H5878]

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
